subject: Fermi GBM trigger 484906918/160514349 is not a GRB
body:
C. M. Hui (MSFC), G. Younes (GWU), and W. S. Paciesas (USRA)
 report on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 484906918/160514349
at 08:21:54.66 UT on 14 May 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to an SGR-like burst.
